title: Marketing & Creative Intern
description:
Are you passionate about storytelling, branding, and digital creativity?
Join us as a Marketing Intern and gain hands-on experience shaping the brand presence of a global engineering company that keeps the world moving.


At Tru-Marine, you will play a part in bringing real-world campaigns to life through exhibitions, social media, videos, and corporate events. This is your chance to learn, create, and make an impact alongside a passionate team driving innovation in the marine industry.


What You’ll Do

Marketing and Content Creation

· Help craft engaging content for LinkedIn, newsletters, and digital campaigns.

· Support the creation of visuals, videos, and marketing collaterals.

· Write captions, taglines, and short-form content that connects with our audience.

Events and Campaign Support

· Participate in planning and execution of exhibitions, sponsorships, and corporate events.

· Coordinate logistics, vendor communication, and on-site arrangements.

· Capture photos, videos, and memorable moments for post-event stories.

Research and Insights

· Conduct competitor and market research to identify trends and opportunities.

· Gather and organize data to support marketing strategies and presentations.

· Update CRM and track engagement metrics for reports.

Team Collaboration

· Work closely with Sales and HR on internal and external marketing initiatives.

· Contribute creative ideas during brainstorming sessions.


What We’re Looking For

· Diploma or currently pursuing a Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or Design.

· Interest in writing, design, or digital media.

· Proficient in Microsoft Office and familiar with Canva, Photoshop, or social media tools.

· Curious, detail-oriented, and eager to learn in a dynamic environment.

· Team player with a positive attitude and creative mindset.


Why Join Us

· Gain real exposure to B2B marketing within a global engineering brand.

· Take ownership of creative projects that make a visible impact.

· Learn directly from experienced marketing professionals.

· Be part of a team that values innovation, sustainability, and creativity.

postedCompany.description:
Tru-Marine is a leading specialist in turbocharger maintenance, repair and overhaul services.

The heart of Tru-Marine's excellence lies in the uncompromising reliability of our service delivery. We take pride in offering high standards of customer-centric service and our focus on quality and innovation has earned accreditation and cooperation from turbocharger makers of international repute.

Our company is certified on three ISO standards namely ISO 9001 on Quality Management, ISO 14001 on Environmental Management, and OSHA 18001 on Organisational Safety and Health.  Internationally, we have an expanding network of service stations to provide time-critical services 24/7 to ships, locomotives, industrial plants and offshore installations. For our commitment to organizational excellence, Tru-Marine won the Singapore Quality Award in 2009 and five years of Enterprise 50 listing.
postedCompany.name: TRU-MARINE PTE. LTD.
